audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no significant background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light-colored shirt, is seated in an office chair, holding a phone to his ear with his right hand. He is viewed from behind, with his head slightly bowed, and the background features horizontal blinds allowing streaks of light to filter through. The scene cuts to another man with gray hair, wearing a dark shirt, seated in a dimly lit room with ornate golden decor and a chandelier in the background, also holding a phone to his ear. He is looking slightly to his right, with his head tilted slightly forward, and his expression remains neutral throughout.
